summary: ThreeDScene Möbius strip via r(u,v)=((1+v cos(u/2))cos u,(1+v cos(u/2))sin u, v sin(u/2)). Phase 1: ValueTracker u_max_tr grows the BLUE surface 0→2π via always_redraw Surface. Phase 2: ValueTracker u_probe advances YELLOW dot + GREEN normal arrow (computed from cross of r_u, r_v) around strip; normal flips after one revolution confirming non-orientability.
